conservative.name: Mask of Aramar
conservative.requirements:
2 Power
Engaged with a shadow, not engaged with an enemy

success.description: As you step into the shadow, tufts of darkness enshroud you further, concealing your form. While this card is recharging, enemies must add to Observation checks to spot you
As above, enemies must add to Observation checks to spot you, instead

chaosStar.description: The whisps of shadows attempting to envelope you writhe swollen and constrictive, and you suffer 1 corruption

reckless.name: Breath of Aramar
reckless.requirements:
3 Power
Within close range of target. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: Opening your mouth, a swarm of shadowy gnats flies forth, enshrouding the target's face in darkness. The target gains the Blinded condition for 2 rounds
As above, and the target suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue

chaosStar.description: Oh-no! If you close your mouth now you'll swallow thousands of gnats! So many appear that all creatures, including you, in close range gain the Blinded condition for 2 rounds
